app.name: TriageX
app.disclaimer: TriageX is not a diagnostic tool. Always consult a medical professional for proper diagnosis and treatment.
app.emergency_alert: ⚠️ CRITICAL: Based on your symptoms, please seek immediate medical attention or call emergency services.

landing.hero_subtitle: Intelligent symptom assessment with visual explanations. Get instant severity evaluation and personalized guidance.
landing.feature1_desc: Advanced NLP-powered symptom extraction and categorization
landing.feature2_desc: Interactive body diagrams highlighting affected areas
landing.feature3_desc: Transparent reasoning for every triage decision

chat.welcome: Hello! I'm your TriageX assistant. I'll help assess your symptoms. Let's start — what symptoms are you experiencing?
chat.ask_duration: How long have you been experiencing these symptoms?
chat.ask_intensity: On a scale of 1-10, how intense are your symptoms? (1 = very mild, 10 = extremely severe)
chat.ask_history: Do you have any relevant medical history? (e.g., chronic conditions, allergies, current medications). Type 'none' if not.
chat.complete: Thank you! I've completed the assessment. View your results below.

auth.switch_to_register: Don't have an account? Sign up
auth.switch_to_login: Already have an account? Sign in
